title: Professional Login Page
subtitle: Props, state, controlled forms, and production-grade event handling
prerequisites: day01 — Vite + React + TypeScript project setup
day01 — functional components with typed props
expectedOutcome: Build controlled form inputs where React state is the single source of truth
Handle submit and change events with correct typing
Explain the difference between props and state in an interview
Implement validation, loading, and error UI states on a login form
definitionOfDone: Email and password validation works with visible error messages
Loading state disables the submit button and shows feedback
Error state displays when login fails
Remember me checkbox persists intent in component state
Layout is responsive on mobile and desktop
Quiz is completed with passing score

tomorrowPreview.title: Reusable Form Components
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will extract today's login inputs into a reusable input library using map, filter, composition, and the children prop — without rewriting form logic from scratch.
